scripts.lint:check: bun run lint && bun run format:check
scripts.test: bun --cwd packages/shared test && bun --cwd apps/server test && bun --cwd apps/mobile test
scripts.test:e2e:fresh: bun run mobile:build && adb install -r apps/mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk && bun run test:e2e
scripts.typecheck: bun --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun --cwd apps/server typecheck && bun --cwd apps/mobile typecheck
